name: Timeshift
short_description: A unique take on 2D platformers. Use your momentum and warping abilities to escape the Rift!
detailed_description:
Timeshift is a puzzle-platformer all about using physics and time travel to your advantage. You can create a saved position, and at any point warp back to it, carrying over any current momentum. This combined with the ability to rotate in any direction leads to a completely unique take on the 2D platformer genre.

You play as Quinn and find yourself in a strange place called the Rift, a canyon that none have returned from. Will you be able to make in through alive?

Timeshift features 6 levels, each with 20 secret coins to find. Try to find them all!
